description: Activation tests for the oss-ready skill — verifies correct triggering on open-source readiness queries and non-triggering on unrelated requests.

evals.input: Is this repo open source ready?
evals.reason: Natural language variant of skill name

evals.input: Can you audit this repo before I push it to public GitHub?
Run a PII scan on this codebase
evals.reason: PII scan is a listed trigger phrase

evals.input: Check this repo for leaked secrets
evals.reason: Secrets scan is a core function

evals.input: Pre-publish check before I open source this project
evals.reason: Pre-publish check is a listed trigger

evals.input: Is this safe to open source?
evals.reason: Direct question about open source safety

evals.input: Is this ready for GitHub public?
evals.reason: Ready for GitHub public is a listed trigger

evals.input: Check the open source readiness of this project
I want to make this repo public, can you check it first?
evals.reason: Making repo public implies open-source readiness audit

evals.input: Audit the code quality of this project
evals.reason: Generic audit without open-source context should not trigger
Deployment is unrelated to open-source readiness

evals.input: Set up CI/CD for this repo
evals.reason: CI/CD setup is explicitly a non-trigger

evals.input: Fix this bug in the authentication module
Add unit tests for the user service
evals.reason: Adding tests is a development task, not an audit

evals.input: Run a security vulnerability scan on our dependencies
evals.reason: Dependency vulnerability scanning is explicitly out of scope (use npm audit)
Code review is a different task

evals.input: Refactor the database module to use connection pooling
evals.reason: Refactoring is unrelated to open-source readiness
